name: magnific-skills
description: Composable Magnific MCP skills for automated visual production — image, video, audio, and 3D primitives plus banner/listing/video-ad orchestrators.

interface.shortDescription: Composable Magnific MCP skills for banners, listings, and video ads
interface.longDescription: magnific-skills turns any MCP-capable coding agent into a visual-production agent on top of the Magnific MCP server. It ships 21 Layer 1 primitives (generate, upscale, relight, remove-background, resize, crop, variations, change-camera, skin-enhancer, video plan/generate/speak/upscale/concatenate, audio TTS/music, 3D, plus creations-upload, flows-run, library-show, folders-list) and 3 Layer 2 orchestrators (banner-flow, listing-visuals, video-ad). Skills chain by passing creation identifiers, and require the Magnific MCP server to be connected. Community project, not official Magnific software.
defaultPrompt: Build an on-brand banner set from this brief and these target sizes
Turn these property photos into a listing visual set
Generate a 15-second product video ad from this brief
Upscale and relight this product image for print
